name: showExplanationQuestion
description: Display one standalone conceptual explanation, reasoning, or calibration question. It must be understandable without any code/example card and must not name or point to a concrete example, function, identifier, object, field, output, mutation, invariant, or assumption from it. Reject wording such as this function, the example, or a named example such as the event processor example; rewrite it as a transferable principle before calling this tool. Then speak the supplied question exactly.

parameters.description: Only an exact standalone conceptual question answerable without seeing or remembering a concrete example. No example references, identifiers, implementation details, lead-in, hint, answer, or explanation.
